text:
2000+ Technology Skill Tests by WeCP

WeCP presents '2000+ Technology Skill Tests' as a comprehensive assessment platform for tech hiring. The article establishes that skill-focused hiring delivers measurable benefits: reducing turnover by 30-75%, cutting training time by 30-70%, and lowering hiring costs by nearly 70%.

The platform maps technology functions to job roles and competencies. For example, it describes assessing a Cloud Infrastructure Engineer candidate by creating a 'VM (Virtual Machine) based coding test' where the task involves fixing server crashes.

WeCP categorizes tech assessments across seven function areas: Frontend/User Experience (using compiler-based and project-based evaluations); Content roles (MCQ, subjective, case studies); Management positions (case studies, diagramming); Backend Robustness (compiler-based, virtual machine coding); Marketing roles (work samples, case studies); Data and Algorithms (data science programming, visualizations); Security specialties (compiler-based coding).

The platform emphasizes identifying candidates who are 'not just knowledgeable in skill but also highly productive,' supported by clients including Deloitte, Infosys, Microsoft, and Bosch.
